    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int ENGINE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE
      The remaining mileage before the next maintenance，Positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID TYPE_ADDITIONAL_ENDURANCE_ENGINE_MILEAGE 发动机保养剩余里程，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_ADDITIONAL_ENDURANCE_ENGINE_MILEAGE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 单位 km mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:27:05
      static int ENGINE_MAINTENANCE_STATE
      Engine maintenance state 发动机保养状态 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Integer property type 具体值由业务自行约定 mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:25:09
      static int ENGINE_MAINTENANCE_TIME
      The remaining time before the next maintenance, positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID TYPE_ADDITIONAL_ENDURANCE_ENGINE_TIME 发动机保养剩余时间，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_ADDITIONAL_ENDURANCE_ENGINE_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 单位 day mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:28:11

      static int VEHICLE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE
      The remaining mileage before the next maintenance, positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID TYPE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE 整车保养剩余里程，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 单位 km mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:18:27

      The remaining time before the next maintenance, positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID is TYPE_MAINTENANCE_TIME 整车保养剩余时间，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_MAINTENANCE_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Float property type 单位 day mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project v446k at 2024-08-20 15:20:17

static final int UNIT_TIME_FORMAT
        Deprecated. Settings.System.TIME_12_24 --- by hang.jiang@ecarxgroup.com

        static final int VEHICLE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE
        The remaining mileage before the next maintenance, positive numbers represent surplus, negative numbers represent excess, original ID TYPE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE 整车保养剩余里程，正数代表剩余，负数代表超出，原 ID 为 TYPE_MAINTENANCE_MILEAGE
